creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Klaus Küchemann from comment #59)

I use a serial console but others may not.

"usb stop" might stop USB keyboard input and such
until something happens to start up usb again. I'm
not sure when that would be in various cases.

RPi4B's 4GB and less (v1.1, v1.2 at least): I've
never checked if "Rob Crowston`s xhci-driver will
restart USB later through another xhci-reset" or
not. Nor do I have a means of checking models
newer than the RPi4B 8GB model. In fact, no means
of checking any v1.2 RPi4B either.
